sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n59387" key="kotta/bisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοττᾰ´β-ῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n59387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">playing at the cottabos</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.654c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
